# bench/hamilton — Hamilton STAR scripts (PyLabRobot)

The **same** portable specs that drive the Opentrons Flex, retargeted to the
**Hamilton STAR** via [PyLabRobot](https://pylabrobot.org). Generated by
`orchestration/portable/backends/pylabrobot_backend.py` — proof that the protocol
*intent* ports across platforms, which is the whole point of the portable layer
(prototype on the Flex → run on the STAR for the 1–3% CV target).

## Files
- `resolvedna_star_plr.py` — the full ResolveDNA protocol on the STAR.
- `wga_move_star_plr.py` — WGA distributes + an iSWAP/gripper plate move.

Regenerate any spec for the STAR:
```bash
pip install pylabrobot
python -m orchestration.portable.render --target pylabrobot --example resolvedna --out bench/hamilton/resolvedna_star_plr.py
```

## Run it
```bash
# Dry run — no hardware. Prints every command (PyLabRobot chatterbox backend):
python bench/hamilton/resolvedna_star_plr.py        # USE_CHATTERBOX = True (default)
```
Set `USE_CHATTERBOX = False` in the file to drive a real STAR (`STARBackend`).
Both generated scripts run start-to-finish under the chatterbox backend.

## What you must edit for YOUR STAR
The protocol body is generated and faithful — **don't** hand-edit it. But the
`DECK SETUP` block near the top is a reasonable default, not your machine:
- **rails / carriers** — `TIP_CAR_288_A00` at rail 1, `PLT_CAR_L5MD_A00` at rail 9
  are placeholders. Set the rails and carrier types your STAR actually uses.
- **labware** — tips map to `hamilton_96_tiprack_1000uL`, plates to
  `Cor_96_wellplate_360ul_Fb`, reservoirs to `CellTreat_12_troughplate_15000ul_Vb`.
  Swap in the exact PLR resource defs matching your consumables.
- **move targets** — `_READER_SITE` is a free plate-carrier site used for plate
  moves; point it where your protocol needs (reader, off-deck, etc.).

## How the mapping works
| Portable step | PyLabRobot / STAR |
|---|---|
| Transfer well→plate (distribute) | `pick_up_tips` → `aspirate(trough*8)` → `dispense(plate col)` → `return_tips` |
| Transfer plate→well (remove) | `aspirate(plate col)` → `dispense(waste*8)` |
| Transfer plate→plate | `aspirate` col i → `dispense` col i |
| `mix_after` | repeated aspirate/dispense at the destination |
| Delay | `asyncio.sleep` |
| Handoff | operator `input()` pause (print under chatterbox) |
| MoveLabware | `lh.move_plate(...)` (STAR iSWAP) |
